svg.title: BrightKids Toys — proposed platform architecture
svg.desc: Single-page architecture diagram showing modernisation: standardised CI/CD image pipeline, centralised API gateway security perimeter, multi-region Kubernetes clusters with strangler fig migration for the legacy pricing monolith, event-driven integration platform replacing 120+ point-to-point integrations, and cross-cutting observability — phased across 6 months and 18 months.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Walk me through the BrightKids current state pain points and the three holiday incidents')
sendPrompt('How does the standardised base image policy reduce BrightKids patching from 11 days to under 24 hours?')
sendPrompt('Explain how Trivy CVE scanning solves the 11-day patching problem BrightKids had')
sendPrompt('What does signed-only image registry policy mean for BrightKids security governance?')
sendPrompt('How does GitOps with ArgoCD replace manual SSH deployments at BrightKids?')
sendPrompt('How does the API gateway address the exposed admin endpoint found in the BrightKids penetration test?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about WAF and DDoS protection at the BrightKids edge')
sendPrompt('How does centralised OAuth2 and mTLS enforcement prevent the BrightKids admin endpoint exposure?')
sendPrompt('Explain per-tenant rate limiting for BrightKids APIs during 8-10x traffic spikes')
sendPrompt('How does admin endpoint isolation prevent the staging-to-production exposure identified in the BrightKids pen test?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the APAC Melbourne cluster design and the strangler fig migration')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the North America cluster design with blue-green deployments')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the EU Germany cluster design and data residency enforcement')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the integration platform strategy and migration from 120 point-to-point integrations')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the event broker design with dead-letter queues and schema registry')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the centralised observability design across all BrightKids regions')
sendPrompt('Tell me about metrics collection for BrightKids observability')
sendPrompt('Tell me about centralised log aggregation across BrightKids regions')
sendPrompt('Tell me about distributed tracing for BrightKids multi-region services')
sendPrompt('Tell me about alerting and on-call design for BrightKids to achieve under 1 hour MTTR')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the SLA dashboard and KPI tracking for BrightKids executives')

g.text: Multi-region K8s · integration migration · monolith decomposition
